lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: The forecast says rain all weekend.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [disappointed] Of course it does. I finally booked that picnic spot.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: We could do it indoors. Blanket on the floor, the whole thing.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [excited] Yes! No insects, no wind, unlimited snacks.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [warming up] Okay… I'm actually starting to prefer this plan.
